paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been 1 new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes a headline from simplywall.st discussing the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and a $375M convertibles deal. This news item was published on 2026-07-17.

There have been various SEC filings, including 8-K forms detailing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there has been 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings.
